title: Madoku Craft
description: Madoku Craft is a configurable Minecraft Overhaul MOD. It modifies Mobs, Items, Seasons, and adds new systems. All of these systems are modifiable in the CONFIG files.
body:
Madoku Craft is a configurable Minecraft overhaul MOD. It modifies Mobs, Items, Smelting, and adds new systems. All of these systems are modifiable in the CONFIG files.

![Seasons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f5fff2f9dca180993ac416605f6fe5b45dc58b3.png)

## Main Features:

**Attributes:**

- The Attribute system modifies attributes to rebalance the game.
- This allows you to customize the game's difficulty to your needs.

![Attributes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a111e275ed39f0bf621987627665f81c202727db_0.webp)

**Items:**

- The Item system modifies item properities based on their category.
- This allows you to modify tools, and stacking limit.

![Stacking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c13bbc2d68cd998301a9ef664c60da1dde8051_0.webp)

**Mobs:**

- The MOB system modifies their behaviors and scales them based on Difficulty.
- Difficulty is determined by the biome, structure, and in-game time.

![Difficulty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36da46fe93f020ce4cd0624bf24875b16a187d5e_0.webp)

**Farming:**

- The Farming system modifies Crops to grow through Time instead of being random.
- Farmland can be fertilized with Bonemeal to increase Crop growing speed and yield.

![Farming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b7e957f69d9596f2c94eb171e0b607472493f5a.gif)

**Leveling:**

- The Leveling system allows players to allocate points to increase certain stats.
- Press K to open up the Menu.

![Leveling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92f2a7c8f93ebfbd9f30009dd8cae6afc666fbe8.png)

**Pets:**

- The Pet system allows players to Equip spawn eggs in the player's Inventory.
- This Spawns a tiny MOB that helps you.


![Pets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66c6db7b4960c273e63335b9d06e31c0e9d7eb74.gif)

## Disclaimer:

- Backup your worlds before using this MOD.
- This MOD modifies Minecraft and might cause unintended issues if removed.
